'''Erg Krow''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] senior [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]].

==Biography==
Erg Krow was a Jedi Master during the era marked by the [[Old Sith Wars]]. When the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]] erupted between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Sith Empire (Exar Kun)/Legends|Sith Empire]], Krow was stationed at the [[Jedi enclave (Mustafar)/Legends|Order's enclave]] on the lush [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]].<ref name="SWG" />

Krow was present when the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] attacked the world. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] used a [[Crystal/Legends|crystal]] to enhance their [[Force power/Legends|powers]] and give them an advantage in the [[Devastation of Mustafar/Legends|battle]]. Somehow, the crystal self-destructed, having drastic consequences for the world. The crystal's explosion caused Mustafar to go off its orbit and caused the planet to turn from luscious green, to hot, molten lava. The only survivor of the cataclysm was Erg Krow, who survived by shielding himself from the blast with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Even though he was able to save his own life, he was left in terrible pain. He dragged what was left of the crystal to a cave and used his powers to make a shield around it, making sure that no one would claim the crystal ever again. After ensuring that the crystal would not be misused again, Krow succumbed to his wounds and [[Death/Legends|died]] within the cave. His shield remained in place for many centuries after his death but eventually it faded as well and the crystal was left unguarded.<ref name="SWG" />

==Legacy==
During the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] nearly four thousand years after Krow's death, Jedi Master [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] he was traveling with discovered the cave and attempted to destroy the crystal, which had become active again. In the cave, the pair [[Mission on Mustafar|encountered]] the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Vartonis]], who entered into a vicious [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|lightsaber duel]] in an attempt to claim the crystal. When the spacer overpowered Vartonis with the aid of Kenobi, the pair quickly destroyed the crystal.<ref name="SWG" />
